title: Make a change to your alcoholic products producer approval (APPA)
body: "About this form  You need to tell HMRC about changes to your alcoholic products producer approval (APPA), or APPA application.  You can use this form to tell us about changes to:   business and contact details ownership and people in charge of the business production and premises details   There are different forms if you need to:   tell HMRC you want to withdraw your APPA application  request to cancel your APPA    When you need to tell us about a change  You need tell us about any change to your APPA as soon as possible.  For some changes you will need to tell us before they happen and others within 14 calendar days.  Read section 4.25 of the alcoholic products technical guide to find out when you need tell HMRC about each change.   If you do not tell us about a change or do not tell us at the right time, you may get penalties.   What you will need  To make a change, you’ll need to provide:   your name and contact details your current business status and details your APPA ID, if you have one   If you do not have an APPA ID, you’ll need to tell us your:   business name Unique Taxpayer Reference (UTR)  APPA submission reference   If you need to change your business and VAT details  You only need to tell us about the business details that have changed, such as your:   name, business name or trading name date of birth National Insurance number address, business or trading address company number   You need to tell us if the business is registered for VAT and if so, the VAT registration number.  If you need to change legal entity or ownership details  You need to tell us the:   new name or business name, if applicable expected completion date   If you have changed ownership details, you will also need to tell us about:   people in charge of the business legal requirements for handling alcohol   If you need to change details about your legal requirements for handling alcohol  You need to tell us about any person owning, controlling, managing or otherwise involved in operating the business who under Customs and Excise Acts has either:   been convicted of an offence had goods seized   You can tell us details in this form, but if you do not, we will contact you for the details.  If you need to change your production or premises details  You only need to tell us about the production that will change, such as the:   type of alcohol you are producing date you will start or end production annual production figure   If you have changed your production details, you may need to provide a business plan and update your premises details.  For each affected premises, you will need to provide the:   address type of alcoholic products that will be stored or produced activities that will be carried out for each type of alcoholic product  APPA ID of any other producer that the business will share the premises with premises plan   You may also...
